verdict: manual-port

# 8e663d2 — fix(bug-2): Generated files ignore .gitignore rules

## Target file(s)
- src/resources/extensions/workflow/git-service.ts
- src/resources/extensions/workflow/gitignore.ts
- src/resources/extensions/workflow/tests/integration/gitignore-staging-2570.test.ts

## Divergence
Both fixes apply cleanly in spirit, but every identifier is renamed:
- upstream `isGsdGitignored` → otto `isGitignored` (in `gitignore.ts` line 122).
- upstream `.gsd/**` exclusion → otto `.otto/workflow/**` (verify by reading existing exclusion strings around line 796 of `git-service.ts`).
- upstream `.gsd` / `.gsd/` probe paths inside `check-ignore` → otto `.otto/workflow` / `.otto/workflow/` (read otto's existing `isGitignored` body at lines 122-140 to confirm).
- git-service has the import / function shape needed: `RUNTIME_EXCLUSION_PATHS` (line 360) and the two `allExclusions = [...RUNTIME_EXCLUSION_PATHS, ...extraExclusions]` spreads at lines 781 and 815 (matches upstream exactly).
- Otto's `isGitignored` does NOT yet use `--no-index`; that bug also exists in otto and is part of this fix.

## Concrete edits
1. In `gitignore.ts` ~line 129: add `"--no-index"` to the `execFileSync("git", ["check-ignore", ...])` argv. Update the docstring comment block at lines 110-120 to mention "already-tracked" semantics.
2. In `git-service.ts`: add an import `import { isGitignored } from "./gitignore.js";` near the existing imports.
3. In `git-service.ts` at line 781 and again at line 815, replace `const allExclusions = [...RUNTIME_EXCLUSION_PATHS, ...extraExclusions];` with:
   ```ts
   const allExclusions = [
     ...RUNTIME_EXCLUSION_PATHS,
     ...(isGitignored(this.basePath) ? [".otto/workflow/**"] : []),
     ...extraExclusions,
   ];
   ```
   Confirm the exact bracket-pattern by reading neighboring otto code (around line 796 push `.otto/workflow/milestones/...`).
4. Port `gitignore-staging-2570.test.ts` from upstream into `tests/integration/`. Replace every `.gsd` with `.otto/workflow` in fixtures and assertions.

## Verdict
Identical bug shape, mechanical rename. Manual-port because of the function-name and dot-dir rebrand; risk is low if the integration test passes.
